title: Guest Lecture on Goal Setting & Design Thinking and Section of Students for Management Development Program Under MSME & Skill India
content: Name of Guest: Mr. Mandeep Dogra,Principal Consultant at SKILLDOM advisor United Arab Emirates ( Startup and Incubation Ecosystem), DGCA Approved Drone Instructor, 25+ Yrs Experience and Founder of Shiksha Lakshya ( 2022). Date: 23/09/2025 Time: 11 A.M Onwards Venue: B-010 Program Coordinator: Dr. Mohit Garawhar & Dr.Rajeev Sharma (IIC & IAC Coordinator, GPTC)
